title: Compressed Items
description: Compress your items into storage crates. With full resource pack support!
body:
## **Compressed Items**: compact your items into storage blocks.

### Block tiers
- Copper (9 Items per Block)
- Iron (81 Items per Block)
- Gold (729 Items per Block)
- Diamond (6561 items per Block)
- Netherite (59049 items per Block)

**Looking for Compressed Blocks? [Check that mod out here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/compressed-items)**
